title: Casino mod
body:
# Crafting the Tables

To craft a Blackjack table, arrange seven wooden planks in the greaves shape. Then click on it with a Skeleton Viser head — the regular table will turn into a Blackjack table.

A slot machine is crafted from iron greaves. Leave the center slot empty and place Redstone dust there.
![Recipies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e369ecce21a9185a561790b6f9a7f4c26678479_0.webp)

# Slot Machine Controls

The front panel has a slot for loading chips — click it to place your bet.

Four buttons control the machine:

Increase bet

Decrease bet

Check current bet

Collect winnings

A lever on the side starts the reels spinning.

# Merchants and Chips

Chips are bought from wandering merchants for emeralds. To unlock chip trading, place a Blackjack table or a diamond block near the merchant. An unemployed villager will gain a profession when nearby and start selling chips.

# DONT FORGET TO INSTALL GECKOLIB
![DONT FORGET TO INSTALL GECKOLIB!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f5e3d46008f3127958ec953cf67796d706eccc2.webp)

# Contacts
